description:
Uploads a new Connector SDK package to your Fivetran account. The package must be a ZIP file containing your custom connector code. You can create the package ZIP file using the [`fivetran package` command](/docs/connector-sdk/technical-reference/connector-sdk-commands#fivetranpackage).

After creating a package, use the standard [Create a Connection endpoint](/docs/rest-api/api-reference/connections/create-connection) with the returned `id` as `package_id` in the config.

> NOTE: Each package can only be associated with one connection at a time.
